summary: End-to-end test of Aggregator admin (Step A + P1 Review Queue) — backend 15/15 pytest passing, frontend UI flows all green (login, tab nav, 4 sub-tabs, source filter, run-all/per-source run buttons, source toggle persistence, scheduler save, approve/reject/bulk-approve on seeded drafts). No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: AggregatorPanel.jsx is 559 lines — borderline; consider splitting Review/Sources/Runs/Settings into separate sub-components if it grows further (still under the 700-line soft limit).

AggregatorPanel.jsx silently swallows errors in refreshAll/refreshDrafts/approveOne/rejectOne (no error toasts on those paths). approveOne/rejectOne/refreshDrafts particularly should surface failures.
server.py: list_sources endpoint does not exclude Mongo `_id`. The `serialize()` helper does this — confirmed in code, no leak observed in responses (tests would have failed otherwise).
Approve flow rewrites `posted_date` to utcnow() — intentional per code comment, but worth noting it shifts the chronology vs. the source's actual publication date.
reject_draft hard-deletes (per the explicit code comment). Consider a soft-delete + audit trail if future regulatory needs arise.

/api/admin/aggregator/sources/{id}/run is synchronous from the client's perspective and can take 25s+ (FETCH_TIMEOUT_SEC). Frontend already shows a spinner — fine for now, but a background-job pattern would scale better.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 mock drafts (slug ^uitest-draft-) under the APSC source for UI testing; all cleaned up post-run. Backend pytest seeded 4 TEST_ drafts and cleaned them up via class fixture. Aggregator sources reset to enabled=True; scheduler reset to enabled=false / interval_hours=24.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 backend pytest assertions in /app/backend/tests/test_aggregator_admin_api.py pass. UI flows confirmed: Aggregator tab → 4 sub-tabs render → review queue shows seeded drafts → approve button (agg-draft-approve-{id}) removes row & publishes, reject (agg-draft-reject-{id}) with confirm hard-deletes, bulk-approve (agg-bulk-approve-btn) works with selected count, scheduler save persists interval_hours, source filter populates from sources, per-source toggle persists. Login redirects to /admin (not /admin/dashboard) — works fine. Mocked dialog accept used for window.confirm.
